topic: Adoptable ideas from competitor AI design tools for sk-interface-design and mcp-magicpath

focus: v0 by Vercel — distinctive design-relevant capabilities

focus: Broader field sweep + consolidated ADOPT/ADAPT/SKIP mapping
noveltyJustification: Broader field (Onlook/Builder/Stitch/Uizard/Relume/tweakcn) produced zero new themes; all fold into T1-T8; value shifted from discovery to consolidation (dedup table + per-skill verdicts) -> saturation

noveltyJustification: Synthesis/prioritization only; no new themes or tools; ranking + reconciliation hooks new; trend 1.00->0.25 = genuine convergence

note: 5/5 iterations; newInfoRatio 1.00->0.70->0.55->0.40->0.25 monotonic; 0 new themes at iter4; all 5 key questions answered
